entries.description: Read project-guidance.md, lessons-learned.md, session-set-authoring-guide.md, ai-led-session-workflow.md, spec.md, verdict.md; confirmed runtime_mode.py ground truth (tier precedence; Lightweight = --no-router not Python-off).
Ran ai_router.start_session; session-state.json -> session 1 in-progress (schemaVersion 4).

Wrote docs/concepts/tier-model.md (D1 SSoT): one-differentiator model, same/differs tables, runtime_mode precedence, banned-vs-correct framing, choose-a-tier question. README/adoption-bootstrap/wizard/spec-schema all point here.

Authored docs/templates/consumer-bootstrap/ bundle (D4/D5/D6/D8): README contract + spec.md.template (schemaVersion-4 companion state, NNN- slug, required tier+verificationMode) + session-state.json.template (v4) + start-here.md.template (cold-start chain + verbatim active-set rule) + engine-file shared body + claude/agents/gemini tails.

Documented tier + verificationMode in docs/spec-md-schema.md config block (overview skeleton, field reference, worked example); fixed the stale 'runs without ai_router (no PyPI dependency)' framing to point to the SSoT.

Reconciled adoption-bootstrap.md (Steps 4.5/6/7/8/9 + references) and quick-start.md to the D3 uniform scaffold; pointerized README tier highlight + wizard.html copy (both-tier Python prereq, SSoT pointer, accurate Lightweight framing). Scrubbed banned framing.

Cross-provider verification (session-verification -> gpt-5-4, cross-provider from Claude). R1 ISSUES_FOUND: 1 Critical (FALSE POSITIVE, empirically dismissed -- spec config block has no schemaVersion field; schemaVersion 4 lives in companion session-state.json.template) + 3 Major + 1 Minor fixed in-flight. R2 confirmed fixes + surfaced 1 Major (repo-scoped tier wording in agents/gemini tails) + 1 Minor (raw vs blob URL) -- both fixed. R3 VERIFIED, no residual stale framing.

Added the shared template writer src/utils/consumerBootstrap.ts: loadTemplateBundle (CRLF-normalized), substituteTokens, expandSpecSessions (one ### Session K of N block per session with session-00K/ keys), expandSessionState (schemaVersion 4, one not-started object per session), renderEngineFile (shared body + per-engine tail), renderConsumerBootstrap (six artifacts; throws on leftover tokens or non-positive totalSessions), plus slug helpers. esbuild copies the canonical docs/templates/consumer-bootstrap bundle into dist/templates so the packaged extension renders at runtime.

Rewrote gitScaffold.ts (dabbler.setupNewProject): tier QuickPick + set title/purpose/totalSessions prompts; pure scaffoldConsumerRepo core renders the six artifacts (skip-existing, never clobber) then runs tier-aware install (reuses installAiRouter for venv + pip install dabbler-ai-router on BOTH tiers; Lightweight removes the seeded ai_router/router-config.yaml = the only D3 divergence). Exported makeSpawner/makeFileOps for reuse.

Rewrote sessionGenPrompt.buildSessionGenPrompt to route through the shared writer: it now shows fully WRITER-RENDERED, session-expanded exemplars (renderSpec/renderSessionState on a fixed 3-session 001-example-feature context) instead of raw {{TOKEN}} templates, fenced with ~~~~ to avoid colliding with the spec's inner yaml fence. NNN- slug, schemaVersion 4, tier, verificationMode required; the retired schemaVersion-2/bare-slug shape never appears.

Added the Get Started wizard 'You're ready - start the next session' closure (D7): tell your orchestrator the literal phrase; docs/dabbler/start-here.md drives the rest on both tiers. Both-tier Python prerequisite and the tier toggle were already correct from S1.

Added TS tests: consumerBootstrap.test.ts (token/slug helpers, exact session-expansion with per-block isolation, CRLF-bundle render, schemaVersion 4, packaged-runtime path + real-dist smoke, totalSessions guard), gitScaffoldCore.test.ts (six writes, skip-existing, Full keeps / Lightweight removes router config, install-failure non-fatal), sessionGenPrompt.test.ts (rendered expanded exemplars, ~~~~ fences, no token leakage, NNN- everywhere). 636 passing; 2 pre-existing Set-026 stub failures (vscode-stub lacks ViewColumn; Set 026 S7 notification label) unrelated to this diff.

Cross-provider verification (session-verification -> gpt-5-4, cross-provider from Claude). R1 ISSUES_FOUND (0 Crit, 2 Major, 1 Minor): prompt embedded raw templates w/ colliding fences -> render exemplars; packaged-runtime path untested + wrong dist fallback -> fixed + new test; loose assertions -> tightened. R2 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major, 2 Minor): CRLF marker fragility -> normalize on load + defensively + CRLF test; copyTemplateBundle warned not failed -> throws + real-dist smoke test; per-block isolation -> asserted. R3 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major, 3 Minor): the Major (VSIX may exclude dist/templates) was EMPIRICALLY DISPROVEN via `vsce ls` (all 8 bundle files packaged) + explicit !dist/templates/** added; 3 Minors fixed (watch re-copy plugin, totalSessions>=1 guard, negative bare-slug prompt assertions). Converged at retry budget -> VERIFIED_WITH_NOTES.

Cold-start acceptance test (both tiers): boots a throwaway repo from the committed golden render and walks engine file -> start-here.md -> active spec.md -> tier resolved -> real start_session.main() entry (mode derived from tier:) -> close via shared gate. ai_router/tests/test_cold_start_acceptance.py.

CI drift guards: ai_router/scripts/drift_guard.py (stale-framing w/ file-allowlisted allow-markers, one-active-set <=1, dist-bundle-in-sync) + 19 tests; golden render snapshot coldStartSnapshot.test.ts; wired into test.yml as drift-guards + template-snapshot jobs.

Operator UAT checklist (14 items, ad-hoc/per-set) for the end-to-end Get Started -> scaffold -> start-the-next-session flow on both tiers; mechanically-backed items pass, live-interaction items pending operator.

Extension 0.27.0 -> 0.28.0 (package.json + package-lock + CHANGELOG held notes); repository-reference.md release-status + version-walk updated. No PyPI bump (ai_router packaged surface unchanged; 0.16.0 from Set 057 remains held).

Full suites: Python 1184 passed/1 skipped, 0 failures; TS unit 638 passing (2 pre-existing Set-026 stub failures in untouched files); vsce ls confirms all 8 dist/templates/consumer-bootstrap files ship; drift_guard exits 0.

Cross-provider verification (session-verification -> gpt-5-4, cross-provider from Claude), 3 rounds. R1 ISSUES_FOUND (4 findings); 3 fixed in-flight (CI-enforce D8 snapshot; drive real start_session entry + fix comment; allowlist the allow-marker escape hatch), 1 deferred (full repository-reference.md staleness, pre-existing/out-of-scope; verifier agreed). R2 two follow-ups applied; R3 all Issue:None = VERIFIED.

Routed next-session-set recommendation (analysis -> gemini-pro): a 059-release-and-stabilize set to ship the held releases (extension 0.28.0, router 0.16.0/0.15.0) and validate end-to-end UX. next-set-recommendation.md.
Authored change-log.md (set COMPLETE, 3/3); disposition.json verification_verdict=VERIFIED, next_orchestrator=null (final session).
